items.question: How much can I earn from product testing?
items.answer: Each product test pays between $10 and $100. Most members earn $100-$500 per month, plus they keep the products they test (which can be worth $50-$500 each). Electronics and home appliances pay the most.

items.question: Do I really get to keep the products?
items.answer: Yes! Most product tests allow you to keep the product for free. Some high-value items may need to be returned, but this is clearly stated before you apply.

items.question: How do I get paid for testing products?
items.answer: You can cash out via PayPal, bank transfer, Bitcoin, Ethereum, or gift cards (Amazon, Apple, Google Play, Robux, Steam, Xbox, PlayStation). Minimum payout is just $5.

items.question: What do I need to do as a product tester?
items.answer: Use the product as instructed (usually 1-3 weeks), take photos/videos if required, and complete a feedback survey or review. That's it!

items.question: Do I need special equipment?
items.answer: Most tests only require a smartphone to take photos. Some electronics tests may require a computer, but this is specified in the test requirements.

items.question: Is Cashog available in my country?
items.answer: Cashog is available in over 50 countries including the US, Canada, UK, Australia, Germany, France, Spain, Italy, and many more. Product testing availability varies by region. Sign up to see available tests in {country}.
